India's voucher-first wallet

Every coupon, point & membership — worth tracking, in one wallet.

PerkWorth auto-scans your SMS for vouchers, tracks ROI on your memberships (Amazon Prime, Croma Plus…) and lets you share with family — privately. Built for Indian households.

Start saving for ₹99/quarter How we protect your data →
DPDP 2023 compliant GDPR ready Razorpay secured

Built for Indian wallets

Stop losing ₹3,000 a year to forgotten coupons.

Three things every Indian household needs — none of them exist together. Until now.

ROI Tracker

Membership smart-tracking. We tell you when Amazon Prime, Croma Plus or BigBasket Super has paid for itself — and when it hasn't.

Voucher Auto-Scan

Bilingual SMS scanner reads Swiggy, Myntra, Tata Neu, Amazon Pay promos automatically. Bank OTPs are never read.

Family Circle

Share specific vouchers with specific family members. No group chats, no screenshots, no accidental leaks.

Perk Tips · Masterclass

Loyalty optimizer
powered by AI.

"You have 1,200 NeuCoins — redeem on BigBasket for 1.2x value vs ₹1 elsewhere. +₹240 unlocked." That's the kind of nudge Pro members get every week.

Trust by design

DPDP 2023 + GDPR ready.

  • ✓ Encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) & at rest (AES-256)
  • ✓ One-tap wipe (Clear All My Data)
  • ✓ JSON/CSV self-service export
  • ✓ Bank OTPs & private chats are never read

Trust, on your terms

We sell memberships — not your data.

PerkWorth's only revenue is the ₹99 quarterly Pro subscription. We don't run ads. We don't profile you. We don't share your wallet with brokers or advertisers. Engineering access to production is logged and auditable.

🔒 bcrypt password hashing 🛡️ HTTPS / TLS 1.3 📜 DPDP 2023 §13 🇪🇺 GDPR Art. 15 + 17 + 20 💳 PCI-DSS via Razorpay

Simple pricing

One plan. ₹99 / quarter.

No ads. No data harvesting. No 7-day free-then-they-charge-you-forever trap. Cancel auto-renewal anytime in-app — your wallet stays.

  • ✓ Unlimited voucher & loyalty storage
  • ✓ AI image scan + bulk SMS extraction
  • ✓ Unlimited Family Circle members
  • ✓ Membership ROI tracker
  • ✓ Perk Tips Masterclass (AI optimizer)
  • ✓ Background Android SMS auto-scan
  • ✓ Priority WhatsApp support
PerkWorth Pro

≈ ₹33/month · billed every 3 months
